results.rendered_html:
pluta p. p. [plu-kta]
1 Swimming, floating.
2 Inundated, submerged, overflowed.
3 Leaped, jumped.
4 Lengthened, protracted or prolated (as a vowel).
5 Covered with, filled with.
6 Bathed in. (See plu).
— taṃ
1 A jump, leap, spring.
2 Capering, one of the paces of a horse.
3 Bounding, vaulting.
Comp.
— gatiḥ a hare. (
— f.)
1 going by leaps.
2 a gallop, bounding motion.
